title: Remove Unused Assignments
description: This rule identifies assignments made to local variables that are never used or immediately overwritten. Such assignments are unnecessary and may negatively impact performance. Removing them enhances code cleanliness and readability.
recommendation: Review and remove any assignments to local variables that are not subsequently used or are immediately overwritten.
impact: Removing unused assignments improves code cleanliness, readability, and potentially performance.

checks.message: Review and remove any assignments to local variables that are not subsequently used or are immediately overwritten.
